query:
SELECT pt.id, pt.external_id, pt.contract_no, DATE(pt.paid_at) AS paid_date, pt.amount, pt.synced_at,
       JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.source') AS source_val
FROM payment_transactions pt
WHERE pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND pt.contract_no = 'CT0126-NBI017-21413-04'
  AND pt.paid_at >= '2026-04-23'
  AND pt.paid_at < '2026-04-24'
ORDER BY pt.id ASC
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
SELECT pt.id, pt.external_id, pt.contract_no, DATE(pt.paid_at) AS paid_date, pt.amount, pt.synced_at,
       JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.source') AS source_val
FROM payment_transactions pt
WHERE pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND pt.contract_no = 'CT0126-NBI017-21413-04'
  AND pt.paid_at >= '2026-04-23'
  AND pt.paid_at < '2026-04-24'
ORDER BY pt.id ASC
